segments.speaker: 题目6/7
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I heard you had an internship this summer at a marketing firm. How was it ？ Not bad. Everyone was friendly. I just wasn't thrilled with some of the work I had to do. Like what? Well, I thought I'd be spending most of my time doing market research, but I ended up doing quite a bit of administrative work, like organizing files. Hmm, I know a place where I want to be an intern next summer. One of my classmates interned there in the past. I should talk to him about his experience so I can avoid any issues.
